name: elite-tok-club
description: TikTok Shop violation recovery portal with real-time Discord sync

scripts.start: npm run build:client && concurrently "tsx server/index.ts" "tsx bot-bridge/index.ts"
scripts.build:web: cd client && vite build && rm -rf ../mobile/www && mkdir -p ../mobile/www && cp -r dist/* ../mobile/www/
scripts.android:bootstrap: pnpm run android:install && cd mobile && (test -d android || npx cap add android) && node scripts/apply-overlay.mjs && (test -f android/app/google-services.json || echo '⚠️  Drop google-services.json into mobile/android/app/ to enable FCM') && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:android: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run android:bootstrap && cd mobile/android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:android:release: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run android:bootstrap && pnpm run android:keystore && cd mobile/android && ./gradlew assembleRelease bundleRelease
scripts.android:open: pnpm run android:bootstrap && cd mobile && npx cap open android
scripts.android:run: pnpm run android:bootstrap && cd mobile && npx cap run android
